name: Bunkyodo Group Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Bunkyodo Group Holdings Co., Ltd. operates various stores in Japan. Its stores offer books, magazines, textbooks, stationery, miscellaneous goods, hobby products, etc. As of August 31, 2020, the company operated 88 stores. Bunkyodo Group Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1891 and is headquartered in Kawasaki, Japan.
